title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used in collaboration with the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to visualize the thinking patterns of drivers and pit crew during races. The visualizations, called Pattern of Thought, were displayed on team helmets, race suits, and garage equipment starting at Monaco.
